step_rationale: BCAA dehydrogenase complex; regulates branched-chain amino-acid metabolism, systemic metabolic axis.
mechanism: Branched-chain amino-acid catabolism via BCKDH complex regulates myocardial energetics and metabolic homoeostasis.

references.title: BCAA exaggerated acute and chronic ischemic heart disease through promotion of NLRP3 via Sirt1.
